name: LuigiOS

verified.onboarding_question: What do you want to do in this community?

observed_drift: The live help forum is named help-forum; an extra text channel named help remains.
An empty duplicate COMMUNITY category remains and should be removed in the next owner UI pass.
The private STAFF category exists, but its four planned staff channels were not verified as created.
Server Guide has a welcome sign but still needs three actionable tasks and resource pages.
Only 7 of 13 public channels are covered by defaults or onboarding answers.
privacy: This audit contains public structure only. Credentials, tokens, member data, and private moderation records are intentionally excluded.
